rationale: Multi-factor analysis correctly citing Annex III, on-jurisdiction, with trade-offs between fairness metrics and practical audit requirements; minor gaps in calibrated confidence markers and no explicit assumption ledger.
rubric_evidence: high-risk AI system under the EU AI Act, specifically Annex III for employment, worker management, and access to self-employment
adverse impact ratio of at least 0.8 and controlled false-negative/false-positive rate gaps
Human oversight, documentation, and robustness are also mandatory
